name: Irish Omelet
recipeInstructions:
1. Separate the eggs and beat the yolks. Add to the mashed potato, mixing thoroughly.
2. Add the lemon juice, chives, salt, and pepper to the potato mixture.
3. Melt the butter in a preheating omelette pan.
4. Whisk the egg whites until stiff and stir them into the potato mixture.
5. Cook the mixture until golden brown.
6. Under the broiler for a final finish and puffing up.
7. Serve immediately.
